creator: larse@isi.edu
text:
sheldon> On Fri, 17 Mar 2000 11:15:26 PST, larse@isi.edu wrote:

> >Description:
> I recorded a CD-R without fixating it, than tried to mount it by accident,
> and the machine paniced.  I still have the disk, let me know if I should
> gather more information (what and how?)

  sheldon> The lack of information provided makes it difficult to
  sheldon> figure out who should look at this. Could show us your
  sheldon> dmesg output and tell us which device you used to mount the
  sheldon> CD-R?

Sheldon, here's what I see:

hbo# mount /dev/acd0c /cdrom
acd0: READ_TOC - ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=24 ascq=00 error=04
panic: vm_fault: fault on nofault entry, addr: c685800
Debugger("panic")
Stopped at	Debugger+0x36:	mov $0,in_Debugger.322

Please let me know if you need any other information.

Lars
